steps.title: Set up the ticket equations
steps.content:
Let $a$ be adult tickets and $c$ be child tickets. The total number of tickets and total revenue give:
$$a+c=32$$
$$15a+10c=400$$

steps.title: Find the adult-ticket amount
steps.content:
Multiply the adult-ticket count by the adult-ticket price:
$$16(15)=240$$
The answer is 240.
